title: Required field registry
human_acceptance_or_explicit_next_goal_b: Next boundary recorded as RP00.P01.M05.S09 Optional field registry; no sensitive production action approved by this subphase.

findings.title: S08 closeout evidence not yet recorded while contract declares production_ready
findings.details: Claude found the only blocking gap was absent S08 closeout evidence under docs/goal-closeout/rp00-p01-m05-s08 while the contract and closeout ledger already marked S08 production_ready.
findings.recommendation: Record packet, command evidence, Claude review result, adjudication, and construction inspection; then rerun Hermes/local validation.
findings.evidence: S08 packet, command evidence, Claude review result, adjudication, and construction inspection are recorded under docs/goal-closeout/rp00-p01-m05-s08; final validation rerun is recorded in command evidence.

findings.title: Mixed indentation in the RP00 contract validator
findings.details: Claude flagged tab indentation introduced around construction-inspection checks.
findings.recommendation: Normalize the touched validator regions to spaces.
findings.evidence: Tabs were normalized to spaces in scripts/validate-rp00-control-plane-contract.mjs; rg for tab characters returns no matches and node --check passes.

findings.title: Missing-key branch of validateHumanApprovalRequiredFields was not exercised
findings.details: Claude found invalid cases used present keys with undefined or invalid values, but did not omit a required key entirely.
findings.recommendation: Add a missing-key negative case in the model test and RP00 validator invalid-record loop.
findings.evidence: model.test.js and scripts/validate-rp00-control-plane-contract.mjs now omit audit_event_ref in one negative record; focused tests and RP00 validator cover the missing-key branch.

findings.title: canonicalPattern documentation strings duplicate source validation regexes
findings.details: Claude identified drift risk where canonicalPattern strings could diverge from enforcement regexes.
findings.recommendation: Derive canonicalPattern values from the source RegExp.source values.
findings.evidence: HUMAN_APPROVAL_REQUIRED_FIELD_REGISTRY now derives steward_ref, correction_route, audit_event_ref, and blocked-claim correction route patterns from the source regex .source values.

findings.title: Completion gate rows outside the pasted diff could not be verified by Claude
findings.details: Claude could not verify whether permission_audit, hermes_validation, and failure_mode_covered rows were stale because those rows were outside the pasted hunk.
findings.recommendation: Confirm unchanged rows are subphase-agnostic or update stale S07 wording.
findings.evidence: Repository validation and direct contract inspection confirm the unchanged rows are subphase-agnostic or current for H00/C00 evidence, while S08-specific implemented/tests/Claude/human approval/production readiness/working behavior rows reference the required field registry.
